data.name: LegalGateIntro
data.value: CommandForge runs system-level Windows commands. Please review and accept the terms before continuing.

data.name: LegalGateReadOnGitHub
data.value: Read the full text on GitHub

data.name: LegalGateAgree
data.value: I have read and agree to all of the terms

data.name: Restart_ConfirmMessage
data.value: Some changes need a restart to complete. Restart now?

data.name: NoCommandsInCategory
data.value: No commands in this category yet.

data.name: Detail_RunDisabledHint
data.value: Running commands arrives in the next phase.

data.name: Detail_SelectPrompt
data.value: Select a command to see its details.

data.name: Confirm_TypeToConfirm
data.value: Type the command name to confirm:

data.name: Confirm_CreateRestorePoint
data.value: Create a System Restore Point first (recommended)

data.name: Exit_RunningMessage
data.value: A command is still running. Cancel it and exit?

data.name: Restore_Failed
data.value: Could not create a restore point (continuing anyway).

data.name: Maint_LowDisk
data.value: Your system drive is low on free space — consider Disk Cleanup.

data.name: Maint_HighUptime
data.value: Your PC has been running for over a week — a restart may help.

data.name: Palette_Placeholder
data.value: Type to search the whole catalog…

data.name: Cmd_info.systeminfo_Desc
data.value: Show a full overview of this system.

data.name: Cmd_info.winver_Desc
data.value: Show the Windows edition, version and build.

data.name: Cmd_info.cpu_Desc
data.value: Show the processor name, cores and clock speed.

data.name: Cmd_info.gpu_Desc
data.value: Show the graphics card name and driver version.

data.name: Cmd_info.disk_Desc
data.value: List physical disks and their media types.

data.name: Cmd_info.uptime_Desc
data.value: Show how long the system has been running.

data.name: Cmd_net.ipconfig.all_Desc
data.value: Show the full IP configuration for all adapters.

data.name: Cmd_net.showadapters_Desc
data.value: List network interfaces and their state.

data.name: Cmd_tweak.godmode_Desc
data.value: Open the all-tasks (God Mode) control panel view.

data.name: Cmd_tweak.showext_Desc
data.value: Always show file name extensions in Explorer.

data.name: Cmd_tweak.showhidden_Desc
data.value: Show hidden files and folders in Explorer.

data.name: Cmd_cleanup.cleanmgr_Desc
data.value: Open the Windows Disk Cleanup tool.

data.name: Cmd_power.batteryreport_Desc
data.value: Generate an HTML battery health report.

data.name: Cmd_winget.upgrade.list_Desc
data.value: Show apps that have newer versions available.

data.name: Cmd_sec.firewall.status_Desc
data.value: Show the status of all firewall profiles.

data.name: Cmd_dism.checkhealth_Desc
data.value: Quickly check the Windows image for corruption (read-only).

data.name: Cmd_dism.scanhealth_Desc
data.value: Deep-scan the Windows image for corruption (read-only, slow).

data.name: Cmd_dism.analyzecomponentstore_Desc
data.value: Analyze WinSxS and report whether a cleanup is recommended.

data.name: Cmd_chkdsk.read_Desc
data.value: Check the C: drive for errors (read-only).

data.name: Cmd_sec.bitlocker.status_Desc
data.value: Show BitLocker encryption status for all volumes.

data.name: Cmd_dev.features.list_Desc
data.value: List the enabled Windows optional features.

data.name: Cmd_dism.restorehealth_Desc
data.value: Repair the Windows image (can take a while; may require a restart).

data.name: Cmd_sfc.scannow_Desc
data.value: Scan and repair protected system files (may require a restart).

data.name: Cmd_net.winsock.reset_Desc
data.value: Reset the Winsock catalog (a restart is required afterwards).

data.name: Cmd_sec.defender.quickscan_Desc
data.value: Run a Microsoft Defender quick scan.

data.name: Cmd_power.hibernate.off_Desc
data.value: Disable hibernation and free the disk space it uses.

data.name: Cmd_tweak.hideext_Desc
data.value: Hide known file name extensions in Explorer.

data.name: Cmd_sec.telemetry.basic_Desc
data.value: Set the telemetry policy to the lowest level. May affect Windows Update on some editions; reversible.

data.name: Cmd_sec.telemetry.restore_Desc
data.value: Remove the telemetry policy override (back to the system default).

data.name: Cmd_dism.startcomponentcleanup_Desc
data.value: Remove superseded components from WinSxS to free disk space. May require a restart.

data.name: Cmd_chkdsk.fix_Desc
data.value: Schedule a full disk check with repair on the system drive at the next restart.

data.name: Cmd_winget.upgrade.all_Desc
data.value: Upgrade every installed app that winget can update.

data.name: Cmd_winget.source.reset_Desc
data.value: Reset the winget package sources to their defaults.

data.name: Cmd_wu.scan_Desc
data.value: Trigger Windows Update to check for new updates now.

data.name: Cmd_wu.reset.components_Desc
data.value: Stop the update services, clear their caches, and restart them. Often fixes stuck updates.

data.name: Cmd_tweak.win11.classicmenu_Desc
data.value: Restore the full right-click menu in Windows 11. Restart Explorer to apply.

data.name: Cmd_tweak.win11.modernmenu_Desc
data.value: Restore the default Windows 11 right-click menu. Restart Explorer to apply.

data.name: Cmd_tweak.restartexplorer_Desc
data.value: Restart the Windows Explorer shell (taskbar and desktop).

data.name: Cmd_tweak.cleariconcache_Desc
data.value: Rebuild the icon cache to fix broken or outdated icons.

data.name: Cmd_net.registerdns_Desc
data.value: Refresh DHCP leases and re-register DNS names.

data.name: Cmd_net.release_Desc
data.value: Release the current DHCP IP lease.

data.name: Cmd_net.renew_Desc
data.value: Request a new DHCP IP lease.

data.name: Cmd_net.ip.reset_Desc
data.value: Reset the TCP/IP stack to its defaults. Requires a restart.

data.name: Cmd_net.full.reset_Desc
data.value: Reset Winsock and TCP/IP and flush the DNS cache. Requires a restart.

data.name: Cmd_clean.cleanmgr.auto_Desc
data.value: Run Disk Cleanup across all categories without prompting.

data.name: Cmd_clean.recyclebin_Desc
data.value: Permanently delete everything in the Recycle Bin.

data.name: Cmd_clean.usertemp_Desc
data.value: Delete the contents of your user temporary folder.

data.name: Cmd_clean.wintemp_Desc
data.value: Delete the contents of the Windows temporary folder.

data.name: Cmd_clean.windowsold_Desc
data.value: Delete the previous Windows installation folder. You will lose the option to roll back.

data.name: Cmd_clean.wucache_Desc
data.value: Stop the update service, delete downloaded update files, and restart it.

data.name: Cmd_clean.deliveryopt_Desc
data.value: Delete cached Delivery Optimization update files.

data.name: Cmd_power.set.highperf_Desc
data.value: Switch the active power plan to High performance.

data.name: Cmd_power.add.ultimate_Desc
data.value: Create the Ultimate Performance power plan.

data.name: Cmd_power.energy_Desc
data.value: Analyze energy efficiency for 60 seconds and save an HTML report to your profile.

data.name: Cmd_power.sleepstudy_Desc
data.value: Save an HTML sleep study report to your profile.

data.name: Cmd_diag.memtest_Desc
data.value: Schedule a RAM test to run at the next restart.

data.name: Cmd_sec.defender.update_Desc
data.value: Download the latest Microsoft Defender definitions.

data.name: Cmd_dev.devmode.on_Desc
data.value: Turn on Windows Developer Mode (allows sideloading).

data.name: Cmd_dev.wsl.install_Desc
data.value: Install the Windows Subsystem for Linux. Requires a restart.

data.name: Cmd_dev.wsl.update_Desc
data.value: Update the Windows Subsystem for Linux kernel.

data.name: Cmd_dev.hyperv.on_Desc
data.value: Turn on the Hyper-V virtualization feature. Requires a restart.

data.name: Cmd_dev.hyperv.off_Desc
data.value: Turn off the Hyper-V virtualization feature. Requires a restart.

data.name: Cmd_dev.sandbox.on_Desc
data.value: Turn on the Windows Sandbox feature. Requires a restart.

data.name: Cmd_dev.netfx3.on_Desc
data.value: Install the .NET Framework 3.5 feature. May require a restart.

data.name: Update_Available
data.value: Version {0} is available. Download and restart now?

data.name: Update_Error_Offline
data.value: Couldn't reach GitHub. Check your internet connection and try again.

data.name: Update_Error_NotFound
data.value: No release feed was found for this app.

data.name: Update_Error_RateLimited
data.value: GitHub rate limit reached. Please try again later.

data.name: Update_Error_ServerError
data.value: GitHub returned a server error. Please try again later.

data.name: Update_Error_NotInstalled
data.value: Updates are only available in the installed version of the app.

data.name: Update_Error_Unknown
data.value: The update check failed. Please try again later.

data.name: Update_Error_CommandRunning
data.value: Finish or cancel the running command before updating.

data.name: Settings_ShowBadges
data.value: Show Admin/Restart badges in the list

data.name: Settings_DangerousLockedTooltip
data.value: Always on — this safety check cannot be disabled.

data.name: Settings_AutoRestorePoint
data.value: Offer a System Restore Point before risky commands

data.name: Settings_WarnOnCancel
data.value: Warn before closing while a command is running

data.name: Settings_ExportImportHint
data.value: Copy your appearance, behavior and favorites to a file to move them to another machine.

data.name: Settings_ProfilesHint
data.value: Save the current settings + favorites as a named profile, then switch between contexts (e.g. Gaming PC, Office).

data.name: Settings_SaveCurrentAsProfile
data.value: Save current as a new profile

data.name: Settings_ImportConfirm
data.value: Replace your current appearance, behavior and favorites with the imported values?

data.name: Settings_ImportInvalid
data.value: The selected file is not a valid CommandForge settings file.

data.name: Settings_NoDataCollected
data.value: This app does not collect any of your data.

data.name: Log_ExportSuccess
data.value: Logs exported to {0}. Review the contents before sharing.

data.name: Error_Message
data.value: Something went wrong. You can copy the details or report this on GitHub.

data.name: ReportBug_ReviewReminder
data.value: Review the .zip contents before attaching it to the issue.

data.name: Settings_ClearLogsConfirm
data.value: Delete old log files? Today's log is kept.

data.name: Settings_ResetConfirm
data.value: Reset all settings to their defaults? Your accepted terms and logs are kept.

data.name: Home_NoFavorites
data.value: No favorites yet. Pin a command with the star icon.

data.name: History_Empty
data.value: No commands have been run yet.

data.name: Recipes_NoSteps
data.value: No steps yet. Add commands below to build the chain.

data.name: Recipe_StoppedRestart
data.value: Recipe paused: a restart is required before continuing.

data.name: UserCmd_Warning
data.value: These commands are not part of the vetted catalog and always run without administrator rights. You alone are responsible for what they do.

data.name: UserCmd_RunConfirm
Legal_EulaSummary
data.value: By using CommandForge you accept that it runs system-level commands at your own risk, with no warranty. The GNU GPL v3 governs your rights; this only adds a risk acknowledgement and warranty disclaimer.

data.name: Legal_GplSummary
data.value: CommandForge is free software under the GNU General Public License v3.0. You may use, study, modify, and redistribute it under the terms of the GPLv3.

data.name: Legal_DisclaimerSummary
data.value: Use at your own risk. System-level commands can change configuration or cause data loss — back up your data and create a restore point before risky operations. CommandForge is not affiliated with Microsoft.

data.name: Legal_PrivacySummary
data.value: Offline-first. CommandForge collects no personal data and has no telemetry; the only network connection is the GitHub update check.

data.name: Cmd_info.hotfixes_Desc
data.value: List installed Windows updates and hotfixes, newest first.

data.name: Cmd_info.drivers_Desc
data.value: List signed device drivers with their versions and providers.

data.name: Cmd_info.bios_Desc
data.value: Show BIOS manufacturer, version, serial number and release date.

data.name: Cmd_info.env_Desc
data.value: List the current environment variables and their values.

data.name: Cmd_info.installedapps_Desc
data.value: List installed programs from the registry uninstall keys.

data.name: Cmd_info.monitors_Desc
data.value: Show connected displays with current resolution and refresh rate.

data.name: Cmd_net.netstat_Desc
data.value: Show active TCP/UDP connections and listening ports with their PIDs.

data.name: Cmd_net.arp_Desc
data.value: Display the ARP table mapping IP addresses to MAC addresses.

data.name: Cmd_net.proxy.show_Desc
data.value: Show the system WinHTTP proxy configuration.

data.name: Cmd_tweak.darkmode.on_Desc
data.value: Switch apps and the system theme to dark mode.

data.name: Cmd_tweak.darkmode.off_Desc
data.value: Switch apps and the system theme back to light mode.

data.name: Cmd_tweak.win11.taskbarleft_Desc
data.value: Align the Windows 11 taskbar to the left and restart Explorer.

data.name: Cmd_tweak.win11.taskbarcenter_Desc
data.value: Center the Windows 11 taskbar and restart Explorer.

data.name: Cmd_tweak.clockseconds.on_Desc
data.value: Show seconds in the Windows 11 taskbar clock and restart Explorer.

data.name: Cmd_tweak.clockseconds.off_Desc
data.value: Hide seconds from the Windows 11 taskbar clock and restart Explorer.

data.name: Cmd_clean.thumbnailcache_Desc
data.value: Delete cached thumbnails and restart Explorer to rebuild them.

data.name: Cmd_clean.fontcache_Desc
data.value: Stop the Font Cache service, clear its cache and restart it.

data.name: Cmd_clean.prefetch_Desc
data.value: Empty the Windows Prefetch folder (rebuilt automatically).

data.name: Cmd_power.requests_Desc
data.value: Show apps and drivers currently preventing sleep or display off.

data.name: Cmd_power.fastboot.off_Desc
data.value: Turn off Fast Startup (hybrid boot) for a full shutdown.

data.name: Cmd_diag.gpresult_Desc
data.value: Show the Resultant Set of Policy (RSoP) summary for this PC and user.

data.name: Cmd_winget.source.list_Desc
data.value: List the configured winget package sources.

data.name: Cmd_sec.defender.status_Desc
data.value: Show Microsoft Defender protection status and signature version.

data.name: Cmd_sec.defender.fullscan_Desc
data.value: Run a full Microsoft Defender antivirus scan (can take a while).

data.name: Cmd_sec.firewall.on_Desc
data.value: Turn the Windows Firewall on for all profiles.

data.name: Cmd_sec.firewall.off_Desc
data.value: Turn the Windows Firewall off for all profiles. This leaves the PC exposed — re-enable it as soon as possible.

data.name: Cmd_dev.wsl.shutdown_Desc
data.value: Stop all running WSL distributions and the WSL virtual machine.

data.name: Cmd_dev.sandbox.off_Desc
data.value: Turn off the Windows Sandbox optional feature. Requires a restart.

data.name: Cmd_dev.longpaths.on_Desc
data.value: Enable Win32 long path (over 260 characters) support.

data.name: Cmd_dev.longpaths.off_Desc
data.value: Disable Win32 long path support (back to the default).
